## 7. Approval Required

**Current Status:** Draft — no implementation tasks have been executed.

To approve and execute:
1. Review all phases and task details above.
2. Update `Approval Status` to `Approved`.
3. Specify execution scope.
4. Send the copy-paste approval command:

```
Approved plan <PLAN-ID>. Execute Phase <N> with <TASK-IDs>.
```
